impact: The daemon task board now stops immediately retrying the syntax-failing domain task and directs the next cycles toward syntax-preflight and retry-prompt repairs. The repair guide gives deterministic guardrails for Python SyntaxError, py_compile, and TypeScript parser failures, pushing workers toward smaller syntactically valid proposals before resuming PP&D domain validation work.
summary: Add supervisor repair guidance and reroute the stuck crawl validation task into narrow daemon-repair tasks after repeated Python syntax rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
